articles.title: US launches new strikes on Iran, targeting missile sites and boats
articles.description: US Central Command says the strikes were taken in "self-defence", while Iran reports it downed a US drone that entered its airspace.
articles.titleJa: 米国、イランへの新たな攻撃を開始、ミサイル基地と船舶を標的に
articles.summary: 米国がイランのミサイル基地などを攻撃し、イランは自国の領空に侵入した米国のドローンを撃墜したと報告。地域情勢の緊張が高まっている。

articles.title: Four killed as school minibus collides with train in Belgium
articles.description: Two schoolchildren, their chaperone and the minibus driver were killed in the crash, says a Belgian minister.
articles.titleJa: ベルギーでスクールミニバスが列車と衝突、4人死亡
articles.summary: ベルギーでスクールミニバスが列車と衝突し、児童2人、付添人1人、運転手1人の計4人が死亡する痛ましい事故が発生した。

articles.title: Eleven killed in Lebanon village as Israel intensifies strikes
articles.description: Israel says it struck 100 Hezbollah infrastructure sites and fighters in Lebanon, after PM Benjamin Netanyahu vows to "crush" Hezbollah.
articles.titleJa: イスラエル攻撃激化、レバノン村で11人死亡
articles.summary: イスラエルがレバノンでの攻撃を激化させ、ヒズボラの施設や戦闘員を攻撃。レバノンの村では11人が死亡したと報じられている。

articles.title: Ebola needs swift response to prevent catastrophe, says DR Congo governor
articles.description: The governor of Ituri said the more time they lose, the closer the province is to disaster.
articles.titleJa: エボラ、壊滅的状況回避には迅速な対応が必要とDRコンゴ知事

articles.title: Netanyahu says Israel will intensify strikes against Hezbollah
articles.description: The Israeli military hits targets in eastern Lebanon after the prime minister announces further strikes.
articles.titleJa: ネタニヤフ首相、ヒズボラへの攻撃強化を表明
articles.summary: イスラエルのネタニヤフ首相がヒズボラへの攻撃を強化すると表明。これを受け、イスラエル軍はレバノン東部の標的を攻撃した。

articles.title: Russia threatens more Kyiv strikes and tells foreign nationals to leave
articles.description: It comes after the Ukrainian capital suffered one of the biggest aerial assaults of the war overnight on Saturday.
articles.titleJa: ロシア、キーウへのさらなる攻撃を威嚇し外国人に退去を促す

articles.title: Australia confirms first diphtheria death amid worst outbreak in decades
articles.description: Most cases are in the Northern Territory with some also in Western Australia, South Australia and Queensland.
articles.titleJa: オーストラリア、数十年来最悪の流行で初のジフテリア死亡例確認
articles.summary: オーストラリアで数十年来最悪のジフテリア流行の中、初の死亡例が確認された。北部準州を中心に複数の州で感染が拡大している。

articles.title: China executes man for murdering prominent gaming tycoon
articles.description: The court said the man poisoned the tycoon for sidelining him after he helped secure a deal with Netflix for the 3 Body Problem.
articles.titleJa: 中国、著名なゲーム界の大物を殺害した男を処刑
articles.summary: 中国で、著名なゲーム界の大物を毒殺した男が処刑された。Netflixとの契約を巡る対立が動機とされている。

articles.description: As speaker, Sonko could use his position to challenge the policies of the president, his one-time ally.

articles.title: Rescuers race to free seven people trapped in flooded Laos cave
articles.description: A team of experts who helped free a teen football team from a Thai cave in 2018 are among the rescuers.
articles.titleJa: ラオスで洪水に見舞われた洞窟に閉じ込められた7人の救出活動が続く
articles.summary: ラオスで洪水により洞窟に閉じ込められた7人の救出活動が進行中。2018年のタイ洞窟救出に携わった専門家チームも参加している。

articles.title: Ferrari unveils its first all-electric car, the 4-door Luce
articles.description: The Italian supercar giant has released images of what will be both its first ever pure EV, and its first car that can seat five people. The Luce eyes a younger clientele and the increasingly competitive Chinese market.
articles.titleJa: フェラーリが初の全電気自動車4ドア「ルーチェ」を発表
articles.summary: イタリアのスーパーカー大手フェラーリが、初の純粋なEVとなる4ドア車「ルーチェ」を発表。若年層と中国市場をターゲットとしている。

articles.title: Marco Rubio's India visit signals effort to steady ties
articles.description: The US secretary of state's visit to New Delhi comes after months of tension between the US and India. Underlying disputes over trade, energy and strategy show trust remains fragile.
articles.titleJa: マルコ・ルビオ国務長官のインド訪問、関係安定化の努力を示す
articles.summary: 米国務長官のニューデリー訪問は、米国とインド間の数ヶ月にわたる緊張の後に行われた。貿易、エネルギー、戦略を巡る根深い紛争が、信頼関係の脆弱さを示している。

articles.title: How jazz became an act of defiance in Nazi Germany
articles.description: The Nazis denounced jazz music as "degenerate art," despite its widespread popularity in Germany. Amid crackdowns on freedom of expression, groups of jazz-loving teenagers formed the Swing Youth in rebellion.
articles.titleJa: ナチス・ドイツにおいてジャズがいかに反抗の行為となったか
articles.summary: ナチスはジャズを「退廃芸術」と非難したが、ドイツでは広く人気があった。表現の自由が弾圧される中、ジャズ愛好の若者たちがスウィング・ユースを結成し反抗した。

articles.title: Putin offers debt relief to new recruits for Ukraine war
articles.description: New recruits for Russia's war in Ukraine will have debts up to 10 million rubles canceled under a presidential decree. Another new law reportedly foresees the use of Russian armed forces to protect citizens abroad.
articles.titleJa: プーチン大統領、ウクライナ戦争の新規兵士に債務救済を提案
articles.summary: ロシアのプーチン大統領が、ウクライナ戦争の新規兵士に対し、最大1000万ルーブルの債務を免除する大統領令を出した。また、ロシア軍を海外市民保護に使う新法も報じられている。

articles.title: Iran medicine shortages worsened by war
articles.description: Amid a fragile ceasefire with the US and Israel, Iranians are finding it harder to access essential medicines as imports and payment systems are disrupted.
articles.titleJa: イランの医薬品不足、戦争により悪化
articles.summary: 米国およびイスラエルとの脆弱な停戦の中、輸入と決済システムが混乱し、イラン国民は必須医薬品へのアクセスが困難になっている。

articles.title: Belgium: Train collides with school bus, several dead
articles.description: A train has crashed into a school bus near a town close to Brussels, killing at least four people, including two children.
articles.titleJa: ベルギー：列車とスクールバスが衝突、複数名が死亡
articles.summary: ブリュッセル近郊の町で列車がスクールバスと衝突し、子供2人を含む少なくとも4人が死亡した。

articles.title: How Berlin's Jewish Hospital survived the Holocaust
articles.description: When Red Army troops entered Berlin's Jewish Hospital in 1945, they were astonished to discover hundreds of Jews living just a couple of miles away from Hitler's bunker.
articles.titleJa: ベルリンのユダヤ人病院がいかにホロコーストを生き延びたか
articles.summary: 1945年、赤軍がベルリンのユダヤ人病院に入ると、ヒトラーの地下壕からわずか数マイルの場所に何百人ものユダヤ人が暮らしているのを発見し、驚愕した。

articles.title: Where are US forces stationed in Europe?
articles.description: The United States operates various bases across the European continent. DW breaks down what these sites are used for, and how many troops are stationed there.
articles.titleJa: 米軍はヨーロッパのどこに駐留しているのか？
articles.summary: 米国はヨーロッパ大陸全域で様々な基地を運営している。これらの施設が何に使われ、どれだけの部隊が駐留しているのかをDWが解説する。

articles.title: Even Trump can't stop the advance of wind power
articles.description: The United States is in the middle of the largest offshore wind expansion in its history — despite Donald Trump waging what clean energy advocates describe as an all-out war against the sector.
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏でさえ風力発電の進歩を止められない
articles.summary: ドナルド・トランプ氏がクリーンエネルギー分野に対し全面戦争を仕掛けているにもかかわらず、米国は史上最大の洋上風力発電拡張を進めている。

articles.title: Sonny Rollins: One of jazz's last living greats dies at 95
articles.description: Revered for albums including "The Bridge" and "Saxophone Colossus," Rollins overcame addiction, prison and self-doubt to become one of jazz's greatest saxophonists.
articles.titleJa: サニー・ロリンズ：ジャズ界最後の生きる巨匠の一人が95歳で死去
articles.summary: 「ザ・ブリッジ」や「サキソフォン・コロッサス」などのアルバムで称賛されたサニー・ロリンズが95歳で死去。彼は中毒、刑務所、自己不信を乗り越え、ジャズ史上最高のサックス奏者の一人となった。

articles.title: Spread of Ebola in DRC ‘outpacing’ response efforts, warns WHO
articles.description:
Director general of World Health Organization urges neighbouring countries to take immediate action
The World Health Organization has warned that the Ebola outbreak is outpacing response efforts and countries neighbouring the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) are at high risk from the disease.
“We are urgently scaling up operations, but at the moment the epidemic is outpacing us,” said the WHO’s director-general, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, as he urged neighbouring countries to take immediate action.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: ‘She does not back down’: the couple seeking to legalise same-sex marriage in Botswana
articles.description:
Bonolo Selelo and Tsholofelo Kumile are going to court for right to wed but face fierce opposition from church groups
Bonolo Selelo was at Botswana’s national museum for a Gaborone Pride event when she spotted Tsholofelo Kumile and was struck by her good looks. The two initiated a conversation and when Kumile expressed anxiety about what a tarot reading at the event might hold, Selelo thought nothing of offering her a hug. The reading turned out positive but Kumile claimed her hug anyway and they talked for hours.
That was 1 October 2023. Two months later, they moved in together. Then, on a hike during the Easter holidays in 2024, Selelo proposed to Kumile. A year later, they visited a local government office to register their intent to marry and were told it wasn’t legal.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: Suspected Ebola cases in DRC pass 900 as health workers face attacks and shortages
articles.description:
WHO says outbreak poses ‘very high’ risk for country, but risk of disease spreading globally remains low
Authorities in the Democratic Republic of the Congo say that suspected Ebola cases have now passed 900 in the ongoing outbreak in the east of the country.
The DRC’s ministry of communication said in a post on X on Sunday that there were 904 suspected cases and 119 suspected deaths.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: Hunger increasingly used as weapon of war as ‘food-related violence’ surges, analysis shows
articles.description:
More than 20,000 attacks on markets, farmland and food distribution systems have been recorded since 2018
Hunger is being increasingly exploited as a weapon of war with more than 20,000 documented incidents of “food-related violence” in the past eight years, new analysis reveals.
Attacks include 1,261 strikes on markets used by families for daily groceries and 863 incidents in which food distribution systems were targeted and workers killed.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: White House pauses removal of detainees to DRC as Ebola outbreak widens
articles.description:
But Trump administration will not return detainees deported to third countries in disease-stricken region
The Trump administration will temporarily pause the removal of refugees to the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) during a spiraling Ebola outbreak, according to reporting by Politico, but experts say the move won’t help prevent the spread of the disease.
At least one woman is now in limbo after officials moved her to Kinshasa, the capital of the DRC, and now say they won’t bring her back because of the Ebola travel ban – despite a judge’s order for her return.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: Venezuela inmates occupy prison roof and set fire to mattresses to highlight alleged abuse
articles.description:
Inmates at Barinas prison allege they were peacefully protesting when prison staff opened fire, leaving some wounded
Inmates at Venezuela’s western Barinas prison staged a protest on its roof on Sunday, piling flaming mattresses and calling for the removal of the facility’s director, whom they accused of overseeing guards as they shot unarmed prisoners.
“We want justice. They are shooting us, the guards and the wardens,” a prisoner said in a video shared by the Venezuelan Observatory of Prisons, a local NGO, on X, in which a man is seen with a bullet wound in his chest.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: ‘Canada is handing people over to ICE’: refugees rejected at border face US detention
articles.description:
As Canada tightens asylum rules, refugees reuniting with family say they were turned over to ICE and jailed for months after failed border claims
As each day in US detention passes, Markens Appolon can feel the life he had dreamed of slipping away.
The 25-year-old fled Haiti to escape the rampant gang violence that upended his university studies in economics, and planned to join family in Montreal.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: US judge dismisses criminal indictment against Kilmar Ábrego García
articles.description:
Judge said Trump administration would not have prosecuted Ábrego had he not challenged his high-profile deportation

Sign up for the Breaking News US newsletter email

A US judge dismissed a criminal indictment against Kilmar Ábrego García on Friday, finding that the Trump administration would not have prosecuted him had he not challenged his high-profile deportation.
Ábrego, who had entered the United States without authorization in the past, became a symbol of the Trump administration’s drive for mass deportations when he was sent to the notorious anti-terrorism mega-prison in El Salvador known as Cecot in March 2025.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: PM says Alberta ‘essential’ to Canada as separatists push for independence
articles.description:
Alberta premier calls for referendum on secession after judge ruled initiative to force binding vote invalid 
The Canadian prime minister, Mark Carney, has said that Alberta is “essential” to the country’s future, hours after the province’s leader moved the oil-rich region closer toward a referendum on independence.
Separatists in the western province spent months collecting signatures seeking to trigger a binding October vote on seceding from the nation.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: Venezuelan makeup artist who was deported to El Salvador seeks asylum in Spain: ‘I feel safe here’
articles.description:
Andry José Hernández Romero was deported from the US to El Salvador’s notorious Cecot prison before he was allowed to return to Venezuela
One of the Venezuelan men sent from the US to El Salvador’s most notorious prison by Donald Trump has moved to Spain to request asylum after concluding that he did not feel safe back home and did not trust US authorities sufficiently to return to fight his legal case.
Andry José Hernández Romero left Venezuela for Spain in early February and is due for his first asylum hearing in court there in a few days, hoping that the country’s liberal approach to immigration will afford him kinder treatment than the US or his own country had provided him, he revealed to the Guardian in his first interview since leaving for Europe.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: Turkish police use water cannon ahead of deposed opposition leader's speech in Izmir
articles.description: The CHP is level with the ruling Justice and Development Party (AKP) in most recent opinion polls and although the next election is not due until 2028, many expect Erdoğan to push for early elections.

articles.title: South Korea overpass collapse kills three in Seoul
articles.description: South Korea authorities launched an investigation after part of a decades-old overpass collapsed in Seoul on 26 May. The accident killed three people and disrupted rail traffic near the capital’s main station.

articles.title: A living craft – how silk is made from cocoon to cloth
articles.description: Through workshops, design studios and local industries, silk production continues to link tradition with contemporary demand, preserving techniques shaped over centuries.

articles.summary: ワークショップやデザインスタジオを通じて、絹生産は伝統と現代の需要を結びつけ、何世紀にもわたる技術を保存している。

articles.title: BP sacks chairman Manifold in a fresh blow to the troubled energy giant
articles.description: Albert Manifold is the third senior BP leader to exit under a cloud in three years, as the British energy giant's boardroom turmoil shows no sign of abating.

articles.title: Two French boys abandoned in Portugal to be returned to France, court document says
articles.description: The Juvenile Court ordered that the two boys, aged four and five, be returned to their country of origin after French authorities decided to place them in the care of social services.
articles.titleJa: ポルトガルで置き去りにされた2人のフランス人少年、フランスへ送還と裁判所文書

articles.title: London to Stirling for under €35: Lumo’s new train route has just launched
articles.description: The operator, which launched in 2021, already runs trains between London King’s Cross, Edinburgh and Glasgow.
articles.titleJa: ロンドンからスターリングへ35ユーロ以下：Lumoの新列車ルートが運行開始

articles.title: African cities sound alarm on climate and housing at Baku urban forum
articles.description: From flooding in Addis Ababa to housing deficits in Luanda, African officials at the World Urban Forum in Baku say climate change and rapid urbanisation are outpacing their ability to respond — and the money to fix it is not there.
articles.titleJa: アフリカの都市がバクー都市フォーラムで気候変動と住宅問題に警鐘
articles.summary: バクーで開催された世界都市フォーラムで、アフリカ諸国の当局者が気候変動と急速な都市化が対応能力を超えており、資金不足を訴えた。

articles.title: Direct talks with Russia would make EU a 'neutral mediator', Estonia warns
articles.description: "This is not the right time to rush into any kind of talks" with Russia, Estonian Foreign Minister Margus Tsahkna has said as debate over how to end the invasion of Ukraine continues.
articles.titleJa: ロシアとの直接対話はEUを「中立的な仲介者」にする、とエストニアが警告
articles.summary: エストニア外相は、ロシアとの直接対話はEUを中立的な仲介者にするとして、今は急いで対話に臨むべき時ではないと警告した。

articles.title: Pope Leo vs AI: Pontiff sounds alarm over the 'culture of power' driving the tech race

articles.title: EU should open all six accession clusters next month, Ukraine's deputy PM says
articles.description: Ukraine is already falling behind on its EU accession timeline, the country’s deputy prime minister for European and Euro-Atlantic integration told Euronews in an exclusive interview, urging all accession clusters to be opened as early as next month.

articles.title: French Open: Sabelenka storms to opening win against Bouzas Maneiro

articles.title: Senegal lawmakers elect ousted PM Sonko as new parliament speaker

articles.title: Israeli air attacks kill seven Palestinians in Gaza

articles.title: ‘United’ Spain first as Barcelona top absent Real Madrid in World Cup squad

articles.title: Libyan forces detain Gaza land convoy activists at Sirte checkpoint
articles.description: Forces loyal to Libyan commander Khalifa Haftar have detained members of a land convoy trying to bring aid to Gaza.

articles.title: Israeli attacks on eastern Lebanon village kill at least 11 people
articles.description: Attacks hit the village of Mashghara in the Bekaa Valley late Monday as Israel intensified its assault across Lebanon.

articles.title: Minorities at World Cup fear ICE threat and how US immigration is enforced

articles.description: Security forces were met by resistance while attempting to clear highway barriers, amid unrest over the government's economic policies.
articles.titleJa: ボリビア人大臣の車列、道路封鎖解除を監督中に待ち伏せ攻撃を受ける
articles.summary: ボリビアで、経済政策への抗議による道路封鎖解除を監督していた大臣の車列が待ち伏せ攻撃を受けた。治安部隊も抵抗に遭った。

articles.title: Iran says World Cup base moved to Mexico from US
articles.description: Iran says Fifa has approved the country's World Cup training base being switched from the United States to Mexico.
articles.titleJa: イラン、ワールドカップ拠点を米国からメキシコへ移転と発表
articles.summary: イランが、FIFAがワールドカップのトレーニング拠点を米国からメキシコへ変更することを承認したと発表した。

articles.title: Jamaica's Jackson smashes meeting record to win 200m
articles.description: Two-time 200m world champion Shericka Jackson produces a dominant display to win the 200m Diamond League event in Xiamen.
articles.titleJa: ジャマイカのジャクソン選手、200mで大会記録を破り優勝
articles.summary: 2度の200m世界チャンピオンであるシェリカ・ジャクソン選手（ジャマイカ）が、厦門で開催されたダイヤモンドリーグ200m種目で圧倒的な走りを見せ優勝し、大会記録を更新した。

articles.title: Rubio says Cuba is threat to US as Havana accuses him of 'lies'
articles.description: Cuba's foreign minister accused Rubio of trying to "instigate a military aggression".
articles.titleJa: ルビオ氏、キューバは米国への脅威と発言、ハバナは「嘘」だと非難
articles.summary: キューバの外務大臣は、ルビオ氏が「軍事侵略を扇動しようとしている」と非難。ルビオ氏はキューバを米国への脅威と見なしている。

articles.title: Trump is putting pressure on Cuba - why and to what end?
articles.description: The US has warned that a peaceful agreement with Cuba is unlikely, Havana insists this is a "fraudulent case" designed to justify military intervention.
articles.titleJa: トランプ政権がキューバに圧力をかける理由と目的は？
articles.summary: 米国がキューバとの平和的合意は困難だと警告する中、ハバナはこれを軍事介入を正当化するための「詐欺的なケース」だと主張している。

articles.title: Cubans grapple with fuel shortages and blackouts as US steps up pressure
articles.description: The BBC speaks to Havana residents after the US charges the country's former leader, Raúl Castro, with murder.
articles.titleJa: 米国の圧力強化を受け、キューバ国民は燃料不足と停電に苦しむ
articles.summary: 米国がキューバの元指導者ラウル・カストロを殺人罪で訴追した後、キューバ国民は燃料不足と大規模停電に直面し、苦しい生活を送っている。

articles.title: Will US invade? Three ways Cuba crisis could play out now
articles.description: The Trump administration has been putting tremendous economic pressure on the island's Communist government.
articles.titleJa: 米国は侵攻するのか？キューバ危機の3つの展開シナリオ
articles.summary: トランプ政権がキューバの共産主義政府に経済的圧力を強めている中、米国によるキューバへの侵攻の可能性とその展開シナリオが議論されている。

articles.title: The death of a relentless mother reopens the wound of Venezuela’s political repression
articles.description: Carmen Navas’s passing reveals alleged institutional coverups, deepening concerns about repression, impunity, and Venezuela’s ongoing democratic collapse.
articles.titleJa: 粘り強い母親の死がベネズエラの政治的抑圧の傷を再燃させる
articles.summary: カルメン・ナバスの死は、ベネズエラにおける制度的隠蔽疑惑を明らかにし、政治的抑圧、不処罰、そして進行中の民主主義の崩壊への懸念を深めている。

articles.title: Rosa Pachurí Paraba: How Monkox indigenous women are leading Bolivia’s response to wildfires
articles.description: Bolivia’s 2024 wildfires devastated Santa Cruz, but Indigenous Chiquitano and Monkox communities led recovery through collective organization, ancestral knowledge and fire management strategies, and revived food systems amid delayed state response.
articles.titleJa: ロサ・パチュリ・パラバ：モンコックス先住民女性がいかにボリビアの山火事対応を主導しているか
articles.summary: ボリビアの2024年山火事からの復旧を、先住民のチキターノ族とモンコックス族のコミュニティ、特に女性たちが、祖先の知識と集団組織を通じて主導し、食料システムを復活させている。

articles.title: Attacks on trans identities become a strategic political tool in Brazil
articles.description: In the last decade in Brazil, transphobia has become one of the main tools for disseminating misinformation. In many cases, it is spread by elected politicians with millions of followers
articles.titleJa: トランスジェンダーのアイデンティティへの攻撃がブラジルで戦略的な政治ツールとなる
articles.summary: 過去10年間、ブラジルではトランスフォビアが誤情報の拡散の主要な手段となり、多くの場合、数百万人のフォロワーを持つ選出された政治家によって広められている。

articles.title: Dominican Republic: Is protecting your environment a way to love your country?
articles.description: Three Dominican ecologists and environmental managers explore how protecting ecosystems, conserving resources, and promoting sustainability represent meaningful acts of patriotism that safeguard communities, biodiversity, and future generations across the nation.
articles.titleJa: ドミニカ共和国：環境を保護することは祖国を愛する方法なのか？
articles.summary: ドミニカ共和国の生態学者らが、生態系保護と持続可能性が、コミュニティ、生物多様性、未来の世代を守る愛国的な行為であると論じている。

articles.title: Across Latin America, May Day protests highlight workers’ struggles and solidarity
articles.description: From Venezuela to Chile, May Day protests across Latin America exposed economic hardship, labor precarity,  gender inequality, and growing public frustration with governments failing to protect workers’ rights and dignity.
articles.titleJa: ラテンアメリカ全土で、メーデーの抗議活動が労働者の苦闘と連帯を浮き彫りにする
articles.summary: ベネズエラからチリまで、ラテンアメリカのメーデー抗議活動は、経済的困難、労働不安、ジェンダー不平等、そして政府への不満を露呈させた。

articles.title: Who is defending Cuba’s threatened species?
articles.description: Cuba hosts some of the world’s richest biodiversity but faces the impacts of climate change, human activity and weak protections. Scientists and activists strive to preserve endangered wildlife and ecosystems.
articles.titleJa: キューバの絶滅危惧種を守っているのは誰か？
articles.summary: キューバは世界有数の豊かな生物多様性を持つが、気候変動、人間活動、不十分な保護の脅威に直面しており、科学者や活動家が絶滅危惧種の保護に努めている。

articles.title: Brazil opens investigation on Google over its AI’s impact on the journalism industry
articles.description: Commissioner Diogo Thomson considered that the insertion of generative AI has “significantly altered the dynamics of access, visibility, and monetization of journalistic content in the digital environment.”
articles.titleJa: ブラジル、GoogleのAIがジャーナリズム業界に与える影響について調査を開始
articles.summary: 生成AIの導入がジャーナリズムコンテンツのアクセス、可視性、収益化のダイナミクスを大きく変えたとして、ブラジルはGoogleに対する調査を開始した。

articles.title: The human cost of the data center push in Latin America
articles.description: In this cross-border article, Global Voices is sharing stories from several countries in Latin America where communities are pushing back against AI-driven data center development.
articles.titleJa: ラテンアメリカにおけるデータセンター推進の人道的コスト
articles.summary: ラテンアメリカの複数の国々で、AI駆動のデータセンター開発に対し地域社会が反発しており、その人道的コストが問題視されている。

articles.title: Brazil: A warning on how AI and deepfakes can become an ’excessive risk‘ to women and girls
articles.description: A technical note by research center Internetlab points out that advances in synthetic image creators increase the risks of gender violence online and talks about platforms’ accountability
articles.titleJa: ブラジル：AIとディープフェイクがいかに女性と少女にとって「過度なリスク」となり得るかの警告
articles.summary: ブラジルの調査機関が、AIとディープフェイクの進歩がオンラインでのジェンダー暴力のリスクを高め、プラットフォームの責任を問うと警告している。

articles.title: AI hype narrative reaches the public healthcare system in El Salvador
articles.description: This time we take you to El Salvador, examining government claims that an AI-supported transformation of the public healthcare system will make it the most advanced in the world.
articles.titleJa: エルサルバドルの公衆衛生システムにAIの誇大宣伝が到達
articles.summary: エルサルバドルで、AIを活用した公衆衛生システムの変革により、世界最先端になるとの政府の主張が検証されている。

articles.title: Islamic State-linked families in Syria return to Australia
articles.description: The group of six Australian women and 13 children had been stranded in a Syrian camp since 2019.
articles.titleJa: シリアにいたイスラム国関連家族がオーストラリアへ帰国
articles.summary: シリアのキャンプに足止めされていたイスラム国関連のオーストラリア人女性6人と子供13人が本国に帰国した。

articles.title: BTS win big as Black Eyed Peas reunite at American Music Awards
articles.description: Other winners included Golden, from the film K-Pop Demon Hunters, Sabrina Carpenter and Katseye.
articles.titleJa: アメリカン・ミュージック・アワードでBTSが多数受賞、ブラック・アイド・ピーズが再結成
articles.summary: アメリカン・ミュージック・アワードでBTSが主要賞を獲得し、ブラック・アイド・ピーズがパフォーマンスで再結成した。

articles.title: Australian police arrest two in connection with gunman Dezi Freeman
articles.description: Police say the pair will be questioned in relation to the fugitive who was shot dead in March.
articles.titleJa: オーストラリア警察、銃撃犯デジ・フリーマン関連で2名を逮捕
articles.summary: オーストラリア警察が、3月に射殺された逃亡犯デジ・フリーマンに関連して2人を逮捕し、尋問する予定である。

articles.title: First Hong Kong astronaut launches into space onboard Chinese mission
articles.description: The 43-year-old police officer and mother of three serves as the team's payload scientist.
articles.titleJa: 香港初の宇宙飛行士が中国の宇宙ミッションに参加し打ち上げ
articles.summary: 香港出身の宇宙飛行士が中国のミッションで宇宙へ向かった。彼女は43歳の警察官で3児の母、ペイロード科学者として活動する。

articles.title: Blast targeting train kills at least 20 in Pakistan
articles.description: Officials say the train had been transporting military personnel home for Eid when it was attacked by armed separatists.
articles.titleJa: パキスタンで列車を狙った爆発、少なくとも20人死亡
articles.summary: パキスタンで軍人を輸送中の列車が武装分離主義者により攻撃され、爆発で少なくとも20人が死亡した。

articles.title: One killed and many feared trapped under collapsed building in Philippines
articles.description: A Malaysian man has died and about 20 people are feared trapped at the site near Manila, officials say.
articles.titleJa: フィリピンで建物崩壊、1名死亡、多数が閉じ込められた恐れ
articles.summary: マニラ近郊で建物が崩壊し、マレーシア人男性1名が死亡、約20名が瓦礫の下に閉じ込められている恐れがあると報じられた。

articles.title: Moment of gas explosion at China coal mine
articles.description: At least 82 people have been killed and two are missing after a gas explosion at a coal mine in northern China on Sunday, officials say.
articles.titleJa: 中国の炭鉱でガス爆発の瞬間、82人以上が死亡
articles.summary: 中国北部の炭鉱でガス爆発が発生し、少なくとも82人が死亡、2人が行方不明となっている。

articles.title: She was told to marry in a country which bans girls' education. So she got in a taxi and fled
articles.description: Nearly five years on from Afghanistan's school ban, young women say they have waved goodbye to their dreams.
articles.titleJa: 女子の教育が禁止された国で結婚を強いられ、タクシーで逃亡
articles.summary: 女子教育が禁止されているアフガニスタンで結婚を強いられた女性がタクシーで逃亡した。多くの若い女性が夢を諦めているという。

articles.title: In Japan, divorce splits parents from children. Could a law change end sole custody?
articles.description: An amendment to Japan's Civil Code looks set to allow shared parenting for the first time.
articles.titleJa: 日本で離婚が親子を分断。法改正で単独親権は終わるか？
articles.summary: 日本では離婚後の単独親権制度が見直され、民法改正により共同親権が初めて認められる可能性がある。

articles.title: An Indian bride dies. Rival claims of murder and suicide set off media frenzy
articles.description: Twisha Sharma, a model and actor, had been married for just five months when she was found dead.
articles.titleJa: インドで花嫁が死亡、殺人か自殺かでメディアが騒然
articles.summary: インドでモデル兼女優の花嫁が結婚5ヶ月で死亡した。殺人か自殺かを巡る論争がメディアで大々的に報じられている。

articles.title: Members consider Chinese request for dispute panel on solar, IT goods measures in India
articles.description: At a meeting of the Dispute Settlement Body (DSB) on 22 May, members considered a request from China for the establishment of a dispute panel to review measures in India affecting imports of solar cells, solar modules and information technology goods. The new DSB Chair, Ambassador Guilherme de Aguiar Patriota (Brazil), also made a statement on advancing the WTO's dispute settlement reform talks.
articles.titleJa: 中国、インドの太陽光・IT製品措置に関する紛争パネル設置要請を検討
articles.summary: WTO紛争解決機関は、インドによる太陽光およびIT製品の輸入措置に対し、中国からの紛争パネル設置要請を検討。WTOの紛争解決改革も議論された。

articles.title: Russian Federation notifies launch of safeguard investigation on motor car pneumatic tyres
articles.description: On 14 May 2026, the Russian Federation notified the WTO’s Committee on Safeguards regarding the initiation on 7 May 2026 of a safeguard investigation on certain motor car pneumatic tyres imported into the customs territory of the Eurasian Economic Union.

articles.title: Members advance transparency work in rules of origin, explore trade facilitation links
articles.description: At a meeting of the Committee on Rules of Origin (CRO) on 11-12 May, WTO members advanced work on transparency and notification practices, discussed the future direction of work on preferential rules of origin for least-developed countries (LDCs), and participated in an information session on the links between trade facilitation and rules of origin. The meeting was chaired by Ms Carol Tsang of Hong Kong, China.
articles.titleJa: 加盟国、原産地規則の透明性向上作業を進め、貿易円滑化との関連を探る
articles.summary: WTO原産地規則委員会で、透明性と通知慣行、後発開発途上国向け特恵原産地規則の方向性、貿易円滑化との関連が議論された。

articles.title: Sweden contributes SEK 2 million to WTO capacity-building activities
articles.description: Sweden has given SEK 2 million (just under CHF 170,000) to the WTO's Global Trust Fund for 2026 to finance technical assistance and training programmes for government officials from developing economies and least-developed countries (LDCs). The contribution was confirmed at a signing ceremony on 8 May at the WTO attended by Ambassador Nina Tornberg of Sweden and the WTO's Director of the Finance and Corporate Services Division, Andrew Rizk.
articles.titleJa: スウェーデン、WTOの能力構築活動に200万スウェーデン・クローナを拠出
articles.summary: スウェーデンは、途上国および後発開発途上国政府関係者向けの技術支援・研修プログラムのため、WTOのグローバル信託基金に200万クローナを拠出した。

articles.title: General Council chair outlines next steps to build on momentum from MC14 negotiations
articles.description: At the first meeting of the General Council since the 14th Ministerial Conference (MC14), the newly elected Chairperson, Ambassador Clare Kelly (New Zealand), reported on her consultations with members on how to continue discussions in Geneva to build upon the high level of convergence on several areas of work at MC14 held in Yaoundé, Cameroon. Members also took note of Türkiye's announcement that it was joining the growing convergence to extend the e-commerce moratorium, with many welcoming the additional progress in narrowing gaps in the discussions.
articles.titleJa: 一般理事会議長、第14回閣僚会議の勢いを活かす次期措置を説明
articles.summary: WTO一般理事会で、第14回閣僚会議後の議論継続について検討され、トルコが電子商取引モラトリアム延長に加わる意向も表明された。

articles.title: United States notifies import surcharges, ready for WTO consultations
articles.description: At a meeting of the Committee on Balance-of-Payments Restrictions held on 5 May, WTO members discussed the United States’ new notification regarding the imposition of import surcharges to address the country’s serious balance-of-payments deficits. The United States said the surcharges took effect on 24 February 2026 and will expire on 24 July 2026, unless extended by an act of Congress. Members welcomed the transparency of the United States and its readiness to engage in consultations in line with WTO rules.
articles.titleJa: 米国、輸入課徴金を通知しWTO協議に意欲
articles.summary: 米国は、深刻な国際収支赤字に対処するため輸入課徴金を課したとWTOに通知。WTO規則に沿った協議に応じる用意があることを示した。

articles.title: WTO members discuss action plan for cotton sector after MC14, World Cotton Day 2026
articles.description: WTO members reviewed global cotton market trends and the path ahead for the cotton sector at meetings in Geneva on 4 May. The meetings follow the high-level cotton event at the 14th WTO Ministerial Conference (MC14) in Cameroon in March. Delegations noted commitments announced at MC14 to invest in African countries moving up the cotton value chain and stressed the vital contribution of cotton to international trade and its potential to foster sustainable development.
articles.titleJa: WTO加盟国、第14回閣僚会議後の綿花部門行動計画を議論
articles.summary: WTO加盟国は、グローバル綿花市場の動向と今後の行動計画を議論。アフリカ諸国への投資と持続可能な開発における綿花の貢献を強調した。

articles.title: Trade Policy Review: Belize
articles.description: The fourth review of the trade policies and practices of Belize takes place on 4 and 6 May 2026. The basis for the review is a report by the WTO Secretariat and a report by the Government of Belize.
articles.titleJa: 貿易政策レビュー：ベリーズ
articles.summary: ベリーズの貿易政策と慣行に関する第4回レビューが5月4日と6日に実施され、WTO事務局とベリーズ政府の報告書がレビューの基礎となる。

articles.title: Members adopt rules of procedure at first Fisheries Subsidies Committee meeting
articles.description: WTO members held the first regular meeting of the Committee on Fisheries Subsidies on 1 May 2026, marking a milestone in the implementation of the Agreement on Fisheries Subsidies. They approved various decisions on the functioning of the Committee.
articles.titleJa: 加盟国、初の漁業補助金委員会会議で議事規則を採択
articles.summary: WTO加盟国は、漁業補助金協定の実施における重要な節目となる初の漁業補助金委員会定期会合で、委員会の運営に関する議事規則を採択した。

articles.title: Transparency on subsidies remains central focus of SCM Committee
articles.description: At regular and special meetings of the Committee on Subsidies and Countervailing Measures (SCM) on 30 April 2026, improving transparency through the timely and complete submission of subsidy notifications was once again a central theme of the Committee’s work. The Chair, Jungsoo Hur of the Republic of Korea, emphasized the critical importance of transparency for the effective operation of the Committee and expressed concern about the continued low level of compliance with notification obligations. He strongly encouraged members to submit their outstanding notifications as soon as possible.
articles.titleJa: 補助金の透明性がSCM委員会の中心的課題に
articles.summary: WTO補助金・相殺措置委員会は、補助金通知の適時かつ完全な提出による透明性向上に焦点を当て、加盟国に未提出通知の迅速な提出を促した。
